pr_text:
## Title: Fix use-after-free vulnerability in bfly5_tw1 FFT butterfly function

### Summary
The `bfly5_tw1` function in the OAI DFT library performs a 5-point butterfly operation for FFT computations using SIMD intrinsics. The original implementation repeatedly dereferenced input pointers (`x0` through `x4`) throughout the function body. If the caller freed the input memory buffer after the first dereference (or during the function execution in multi-threaded contexts), subsequent accesses would
